# shell

App shell for Forge. Registers the /forge app entry and defines Forge.Sidebar/Toolbar slots.

## Plugin reference

- Description: App shell for Forge. Registers the /forge app entry and defines Forge.Sidebar/Toolbar slots.
- Web:
